use_cases: Visualize categorical data with multiple stacked segments across time periods
Compare distribution of values across different categories
Display parts-to-whole relationships in business metrics
Track multi-series data trends over sequential intervals
Present comparative analytics in dashboards and reports
ai_summary: A Reaviz-based stacked bar chart component that visualizes categorical data with multiple stacked segments. Built with LinearXAxis and LinearYAxis components, it renders comparison metrics across categories using StackedBarSeries. Ideal for SaaS dashboards, analytics platforms, and business intelligence tools requiring data distribution visualization.
